title: Croatian Croque Monsieur
description: A twist on the classic French dish, this Croatian-inspired Croque Monsieur adds a rich and creamy element with the addition of melted cheese.

ingredients.name: Croque Monsieur sauce
ingredients.notes: Make your own or use store-bought

instructions: Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place two bread slices, buttered side down, in a baking dish.
Spread a layer of Croque Monsieur sauce on top of each bread slice.
Sprinkle melted cheese over the sauce.
Place the remaining bread slices, buttered side up, on top of the cheese.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
